command: sshpass -p 'jose' ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o PasswordAuthentication=yes root@192.168.0.118 'whoami && hostname && echo SSH_OK' 2>&1; sshpass -p 'jose' ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o PasswordAuthentication=yes debian@192.168.0.118 'whoami && hostname && echo SSH_OK' 2>&1 | head -3
